items.h: Kris Statlander Hopes To Carry TBS Championship Into AEW All In 2026
items.p: Former AEW Women's World Champion and TBS Champion Kris Statlander is eager to have gold around her waist when she heads into All In in August.

items.h: AEW's Dustin Rhodes Says He Never Wants To Wrestle His Brother Cody Rhodes Again
items.p: Despite the magic they created in their Double or Nothing match in 2019, Dustin Rhodes would prefer to never wrestle his brother Cody again.

items.h: AEW Collision ratings down against NBA Finals
items.p: Saturday night’s episode of AEW Collision averaged 364,000 viewers on TNT, down 26.6 percent from the previous week. It’s the second-lowest audience total for the show since May 9. Collision drew...
